nasb.text: Then she spoke, saying, “Formerly they used to say, ‘They will surely ask advice at Abel,’ and thus they ended the dispute.

esv.text: Then she said, “They used to say in former times, ‘Let them but ask counsel at Abel,’ and so they settled a matter.

cnv.text: 婦人說：“古時人常說：‘只要在亞比拉求問，事就必成全。’

ccb.text: 妇人说：“古时候人们常说，‘有事到亚比拉去请教，问题都会解决。’
